title: Inviting Friends to a Movie 约看电影

lines.en: Ryan, are you free this Saturday?
I think so. What is up?
Do you want to go see a movie with me?
lines.zh: 你想和我一起去看电影吗？

lines.en: Sure! What movie are we watching?
There is a new animation about space robots.
lines.zh: 有一部新的太空机器人动画片。

lines.en: That sounds awesome! What time is the show?
lines.zh: 听起来太棒了！几点放映？

lines.en: There is a show at two o clock in the afternoon.
Of course! We can get popcorn and cola.
lines.zh: 当然！我们可以买爆米花和可乐。

lines.en: Great! I will meet you at the cinema at one thirty.
lines.zh: 太好了！我一点半在电影院等你。
